message:
feat(test): add 9 serde/invariant tests for IndexFlushReason and report types

Extend proptest_indexing.rs with:
- IndexFlushReason serde roundtrip and snake_case label validation
- IndexingIngestReport/IndexingTickResult serde roundtrip tests
- SearchDocumentSource serde roundtrip
- Default value verification for report types
- flush_reason presence iff flushed_docs > 0 invariant
- All flush reason labels uniqueness check

Total: 49 property-based tests (was 40).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
